description: Style NoteA sartorial twist to the classic wingtip brogue, ganuchi brings this highly formal style to a semi-formal (almost casual) shoe. The shoe features a lovely chocolate brown upper with carefully detailed brogueing. It packs stylish punch and tones and classes up an off-duty ensemble effortlessly.Product Details Round toed, brown shoes with wingtip brogueingCentral lace-ups and a soft footbedUpper adhered to the TPU outsoleOutsole has a stacked heel with aggressive lugsMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlight
